title: Village Eye of Ender
description: Adds a new item called Eye of Villages which can help locate and track down villages.
body:
![Kinetic Hosting Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2ceccee7a5e7c9cc7b5392136f2a66bec22314c.png)

## [Save 15% For The First Month on Your Next Server!—Use Code **_Paragon_** and Click Here to Get Started!](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=910)


Village Eye of Ender
This mod adds a new item called the Eye of Villages!

This item is very akin to the standard vanilla Eye of Ender which can be used to locate strongholds, but this item instead locates the nearest village.

Say goodbye to mindless wandering in search for a village, as you now have the Eye of Villages!


It can be crafted by surrounding an Eye of Ender with Emeralds in a crafting table (refer to the image)

Recipe:


![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/491d9ac32e7893c0bb16eac7477a3a91411bbfaf.png)


Versions 1.0.1+ require [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

Version 1.0.1 requires [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)

[Click Here for Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/village-eye-of-ender)
